creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Lots of reasons to check out @medadubai - a Mediterranean tapas and bar @tajdubaidowntown!

• Impressive selection of tapas and cocktails 
• Pork delicatessen. Suckling pig is the best one we’ve had by far.
• Traditional Mediterranean dishes with a modern twist
• Chic ambiance and warm service

🍴Business lunch: 130 AED: 3 course meal
🍸Aperitivo: 79 AED for a drink and 3 tapas

Save this for your next lunch/dinner date!

👗 @jenni_wears 

#MedaDubai #TajDubai #ladyandhersweetescapes #visitUAE #dubaiblogger #uaeblogger #travelblogger #pinayblogger #mydubai #dubai #visitdubai #DubaiReels #DubaiEats

transcription.text: In the morning when I wake And the sun is coming through Oh, you fill my lungs with sweetness
